violations.text: A couple wall tiles in the (kitchen) area are in poor repair. Observed a hole in wall tile and a missing tile. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 02/03/2026

The ceiling in the kitchen is in poor repair. Several ceiling tiles were observed cracked or with holes at time of inspection. Ceiling tiles are not smooth, durable, and easily cleanable. Ceiling tiles must be smooth, durable and easily cleanable. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 01/20/2026

The Refrigerator in the kitchen area was not in good repair. The unit was observed to be maintaining an ambient temperature of 42 to 48 degrees Fahrenheit. At the time of inspection, the unit was observed used for storage of shelf stable items. Unit is not to be used for storage of Time/Temperature Control for Safety Foods until unit is repaired/replaced. New Violation. Correct By: 10/31/2024

Thermometers are lacking in the refrigerator. Cold holding equipment used for time/temperature control for safety (TCS) foods must have at least one thermometer that is located to allow easy viewing of the temperature display. New Violation. Correct By: 11/09/2023
